label: How It Works
heading: Up and running in three steps.

items.title: Connect
items.description: Point us at your project. We analyze your codebase, dependencies, and workflow to build a tailored setup.

items.title: Configure
items.description: Customize the pipeline to match your team's standards. Set quality gates, review rules, and deployment targets.

items.title: Ship
items.description: Start shipping. Your team focuses on what matters while the system handles the rest.
